title: Trigger The Immediate Alert
goal: Trigger the immediate alert on the DemoQA alerts page and stop after the alert has been observed.
instruction: Open the DemoQA alerts page, trigger the immediate alert, and stop after it appears.
review_notes: Immediate-alert task on DemoQA. Uses trace-note scoring because the alert itself is transient browser UI.

success_assertions.value: dialog: alert - You clicked a button

steps.explanation: I triggered the immediate alert so the browser can show the message for this control.

action.summary: I triggered the immediate alert and stopped after it appeared.

steps.explanation: The alert has already appeared, so I am ending the task.
